summary: Fix calendar sync for multi-account Google Workspace sessions and show What's New after updates.

fixed: Calendar sync detects the correct Google account slot (u/0, u/1, …) instead of always using account 0 — Work/Qantas calendars now sync when it is not your first Google login
Session API requests send full Google cookies and try multiple account indices and calendar IDs
Embedded calendar sync uses a reliable native bridge instead of fragile JavaScript callbacks
All-day API events parse start and end dates correctly
introduced: What's New splash appears on first launch after each upgrade with release notes for that version
